name: @nebula-studio/electron
description: A starter for creating a TypeScript package.
author: Author Name <author.name@mail.com>

scripts.package:windows: vp run build && vp exec electron-builder --win nsis --publish never --config.directories.output=release/windows
scripts.package:linux: vp run build && vp exec electron-builder --linux AppImage --publish never --config.directories.output=release/linux
scripts.package:macos: vp run build && vp exec electron-builder --mac dmg --publish never --config.directories.output=release/macos
